name: Quail Run Leisure Center - Pool & Golf Sim
about: Quail Run Leisure Center offers a state-of-the-art golf simulator experience alongside other amenities like a swimming pool and event spaces. The venue provides a contactless rental system where users can book tee times online and receive a digital key to access the facility. It is designed to be a family-friendly environment accessible to both members and non-members, featuring a simulator that allows for various play modes including local, online, and tournament formats. Pricing is structured on an hourly basis with a notable discount for members, making it a flexible option for individuals and groups looking to enjoy virtual golf in a community setting.
why_golfers_like_it: ProTee VX overhead launch monitor provides accurate data for both right and left-handed players
GSPro software offers access to a wide variety of golf courses worldwide
Contactless rental process allows for convenient and private sessions
No need for special balls or tracking stickers on clubs

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are required to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and suitable for children.
